team_name: Cognitive Procurement Intelligence (CPI) Framework: A Neuro-Symbolic and Multimodal System for Automated Tender Evaluation
summary: Design an AI system that automates tender evaluation, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and auditability. The system should understand tender requirements, analyze bidder submissions, provide explainable decisions, and flag ambiguous cases.
key_steps: Analyzing bidder submissions across multiple formats
Flagging ambiguous cases for manual review
optimization_claims: Reduces evaluation time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: No mechanism to detect fraud or inconsistencies
